Verify navigation links are present and clickable

PASS
Date & time
2026-04-25 22:59:14
Requirement ticket
QA-104
Test ID
—
Tags
API · Login
URL
https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com
Run ID
85660bf8-48e0-489b-bbd3-d25b946347fb

Test Steps

Scenario: Unsuccessful login with invalid credentials
Given the authentication endpoint is available
And the request header "Content-Type" is "application/json"
When I send a POST request to "/auth" with body:
"""
{
"username": "admins",
"password": "password123"
}
"""
Then the response status code should be 200
And the response body should contain a "reason"
And the "reason" value should be "Bad credentials'

Test Results

Given the authentication endpoint is available

And the request header "Content-Type" is "application/json"

When I send a POST request to "/auth" with body: { "username": "admins", "password": "password123" }

Then the response status code should be 200

And the response body should contain a "reason"

And the "reason" value should be "Bad credentials'

Post-Run Summary

The test passed successfully. All API steps executed without errors, including authentication and response validation. The root cause is likely a misconfigured or outdated test scenario, as the test passed despite expecting navigation link verification (which is UI-related), but only performed API calls. A practical next step is to update the test title and description to accurately reflect that it verifies authentication API behavior, not navigation links.

Test Steps

When The user scrolls to the support section

And support via Ministry of Testing Pro

Post-Run Summary

The test passed successfully. All five steps executed without errors, confirming the support section is present and contains book promotions and a membership link. The LLM validation passed against the DOM, and Playwright assertions for visibility and text matched expectations. No failures or timeouts occurred during execution. A practical next step is to verify the book links are functional by clicking them and checking for valid redirects or purchase pages.
